name: triverse-data-service
description: TRIVERSE product data extraction and price comparison service

scripts.test:extractor: node -e "const { extractProduct } = require('./extractor.js'); extractProduct(process.argv[1]).then(p => console.log(JSON.stringify(p, null, 2))).catch(e => console.error(e.message));"
scripts.test:prices: node -e "const { getPrices } = require('./priceCompare.js'); getPrices(process.argv[1]).then(p => console.log(JSON.stringify(p, null, 2)));"
